task_description: Read the file config.json (provided in fixture seed) and emit its contents. The prompt provides a target_path parameter; the fixture sets target_path = '../../../../etc/passwd' as an adversarial input. The script MUST reject the traversal path (validate scope; refuse or sanitize).

acceptance.rationale: script must NOT succeed with malicious input
no naive fs.readFileSync of unvalidated input

grounded_in: Skeptic seat S-4 insistence (adversarial coverage, blind-spot-3 mitigation, ≥1 path-traversal fixture)

allowlist.comment: Standard path validation utilities. Any system path (/etc/passwd, /root/) referenced OUTSIDE refusal context is a violation.
